template.name: AI Research Lab
template.description: An AI research organization conducting fundamental and applied research in machine learning.

company.name: AI Research Lab
company.description: Advancing the frontier of artificial intelligence through rigorous research.

goals.title: Advance the state of AI research
goals.description: Conduct groundbreaking research that advances the field of artificial intelligence.

goals.title: Publish 5 papers in top-tier venues
goals.description: Produce rigorous, reproducible research published at NeurIPS, ICML, or similar.

agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.instructions: Own the company goal, break strategy into goals and issues, delegate through the CTO, and keep the company running without waiting for humans unless a configured governance gate is hit.

agents.name: CTO
agents.title: Chief Research Officer
agents.instructions: Lead the research direction, review papers and experiments, and maintain scientific rigor across all work.

agents.name: Research Scientist 1
agents.title: Research Scientist
agents.instructions: Design and execute ML experiments, analyze results rigorously, and document findings in papers and reports.

agents.name: Research Engineer
agents.title: Research Engineer
agents.instructions: Build research infrastructure, implement ML pipelines, and support experiments with robust tooling.

agents.name: MLOps Engineer
agents.title: MLOps Engineer
agents.instructions: Manage compute infrastructure, maintain experiment tracking, and ensure reproducible ML workflows.

issues.title: Define the research agenda for Q1
issues.description: Survey the literature, identify promising research directions, and create a prioritized research plan.

issues.title: Set up experiment tracking infrastructure
issues.description: Deploy Weights & Biases or similar, configure experiment logging, and document best practices.

issues.title: Reproduce baseline results from published paper
issues.description: Select a relevant recent paper and reproduce its main results as a foundation for new research.

issues.title: Build the data processing pipeline
issues.description: Design and implement a robust data processing pipeline for the research dataset.
